warnings.message: EgyptiansRealEstateFund has stale periods; max gap 510 days
No fully-observed dates across the active universe -- aligned panel is empty.

transformations: TBills: replaced raw delta-yield with ou_simulated feed (Egypt CBE anchored)
EgyptiansRealEstateFund: Geltner unsmoothing applied to remove appraisal smoothing
Active universe: EM imputer completed 5 assets in 150 iterations

concentration_enforcement.description: Per-asset floors/ceilings and joint EGX30+EGX100 cap in optimizer and diagnostics.

institutional_risk_limits.operational_note: Pre-trade enterprise limits (custodian, mandate, liquidity) are out of scope for this codebase; document in external policy and map to PROFILE_BOUNDS as needed. The Optimal (tangency) strategic profile intentionally may not satisfy PROFILE_BOUNDS.

drift_assessment.message: No config/drift_baseline.json — run scripts/snapshot_drift_baseline.py and commit for drift monitoring.

model_risk_controls.strategic: Constrained frontier constructions; MC-scored Optimal pick; constraint_diagnostics on each allocation.
model_risk_controls.tactical: Time-ordered CV, class-imbalance gate, fold F1 stability and calibration dampeners, ensemble disagreement penalty, panel-QA confidence scaling (no raw data mutation).
model_risk_controls.backtest: Walk-forward segments with persisted leakage checks.

Optimal.rebalancing_note: Quarterly strategic rebalance for Optimal profile. Inflation pressure positive: tilt toward Gold and short-duration T-Bills.

constraint_diagnostics.note: PROFILE_BOUNDS and EGX_EQUITY_CAP are advisory for this profile; weights are unconstrained tangency max Sharpe.

Optimal.note: Layer 1 sets direction; Layer 2 governs timing, sizing and protection. Inflation regime=low (YoY=14.01%, real_yield=11.81%).

persona_guidance.strategic_investor: Use the strategic Optimal allocation as a quarterly anchor. Inflation regime adjusts the tactical tilt automatically.
persona_guidance.tactical_trader: Read tactical_signal.signal alongside suggested_position_size; apply suggested_tilt only after confirming the rebalance window is open.
